form.formComment: Drawn inside box. Most recently finished last over 440m at Goulburn beaten 7 lengths (25.45) behind Cawbourne Zara in a Grade 5 on April 10. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th on April 5 over 366m at Capalaba behind Zipping Mehary beaten 7 lengths (20.33) in a Restricted WIN. Leading chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th on April 5 over 366m at Capalaba behind Zipping Mehary beaten 7 lengths (20.33) in a Restricted WIN. Leading chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on at the end of the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fourth (30.37) in a GR 5 at Wentworth Park and returns after a five months break. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a fourth (30.37) in a GR 5 at Wentworth Park and returns after a five months break. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 330m. Last start finished 5th on March 4 over 330m at this track behind Let's Go Out beaten 5.5 lengths (19.15) in a Grade 5. Has run slick time here with a 18.92 PB at the distance. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 330m. Last start finished 5th on March 4 over 330m at this track behind Let's Go Out beaten 5.5 lengths (19.15) in a Grade 5. Has run slick time here with a 18.92 PB at the distance. Go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dwelt at the start and raced wide on the home turn.

form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking an excellent 18.70 for the 330m trip. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking an excellent 18.70 for the 330m trip. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 431m at Gunnedah. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3.5 lengths second at this track but did record a solid 18.93 over the 330m trip. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at the last two runs, both at Dubbo, the latest when beaten 8 lengths behind Raven Fire over 318m. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished last in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 330m at this track behind My Rupee beaten 11 lengths (19.69). Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Returns from a four-and-a-half months break and only other fresh up run was on debut, when a 22.15 winner over 400m at Maitland. Can't recommend against this lot.
